name: Index Fund
tagline: Index fund with on-chain LP cap table.
description: A tokenized index fund entity with an on-chain LP cap table. The Portfolio Manager tracks position weights, rebalances on schedule, and maintains transparent NAV accounting. LP issuance and redemption run through the COMPANY treasury. Start here when you want a passive, rules-based allocation vehicle with full on-chain auditability.

root.name: Portfolio Manager
root.system_prompt: You are the Portfolio Manager for this index fund. Your job is to maintain the target index weights, rebalance when drift exceeds threshold, report NAV and performance to LPs on schedule, and flag any liquidity or compliance issues before they compound. You track every position as an idea, every rebalance as a quest, and every LP event as a session. You do not make discretionary bets — you implement the index methodology faithfully. When the operator signals a methodology change, document it as an idea and open a rebalance quest immediately.
root.proactive_greeting: Portfolio Manager here. Before this fund can operate, we need a methodology: what assets are in the index, how they're weighted, and how often we rebalance. Open the 'Define initial index methodology' quest and let's lock it down. Once the methodology idea is approved, I'll have everything I need to run the fund.

args.query: fund methodology and current index weights

seed_ideas.name: Index methodology
seed_ideas.content: Define the index universe, weighting scheme (equal-weight, market-cap, custom), rebalance frequency, and drift threshold that triggers an off-schedule rebalance. Store the live target weights here and update after every approved methodology change.

seed_ideas.name: NAV accounting procedure
seed_ideas.content: NAV = sum(position_qty * mark_price) / total_LP_shares. Mark prices pull from the on-chain oracle at midnight UTC. Publish NAV to the LP cap table event log after each rebalance and on the first of every month regardless of rebalance activity.

seed_quests.subject: Define initial index methodology and target weights
seed_quests.description: Decide the universe, weighting scheme, rebalance frequency, and drift threshold. Write the result into the 'Index methodology' idea. This quest closes when the methodology idea is complete and the operator has approved it.
